name: ralph-runner
description: Autonomous task runner — reads prd.json user stories, tracks progress inline, and drives Copilot Chat to execute each story in an automated loop

ralph-runner.maxAutonomousLoops.description: Maximum number of steps to execute per run before pausing.

ralph-runner.loopDelayMs.description: Settle time in milliseconds between iterations.

ralph-runner.copilotResponsePollMs.description: How often (ms) to poll for Copilot idle state.

ralph-runner.copilotTimeoutMs.description: Maximum time (ms) to wait for Copilot per step (default 1 hour).

ralph-runner.copilotMinWaitMs.description: Minimum time (ms) to wait for Copilot to start working before checking the step is complete.

ralph-runner.autoInjectProjectConstraint.description: Automatically include initialized project constraints when building task prompts once prompt injection is enabled.

ralph-runner.requireProjectConstraintsBe.description: Require project constraints to be initialized before RALPH can start executing stories.

ralph-runner.autoInjectDesignContext.description: Automatically include recorded design context when building task prompts once design-context injection is enabled.

ralph-runner.requireDesignContextForTagg.description: Require design context for stories that the workflow treats as design-sensitive before execution can proceed.

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
